{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Carturus World Spirit
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[World Spirit]] of [[Carturus]] jealously guards all treasures and has a deal with the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
